title: Generate a Docusaurus docs site that aggregates per-package docs
description: Scaffolds a non-published docs site under apps/ (scope:app). Workspace docs are authored in the site's co-located docs/; each package's own docs/ folder is assembled in at build time by the config-generator + sync-docs executors.

directory.description: Workspace-relative directory of the site project. Default: apps/<name>.

packageName.description: package.json name of the site project. Default: <name>.

baseUrl.description: Base URL path (GitHub Pages project sites need '/<repo>/').

repoUrl.description: Repository URL for the navbar GitHub link.
